name: Vishwam Rajagopal
imageAlt: Vishwam playing football on the beach
bio: I am passionate about trying to understand and make sense of systems and the hacks that people create to achieve their goals. I believe in the power of shared truth, fostering collaboration with fellow researchers and stakeholders alike.

Outside of work, I am embracing the journey of parenthood alongside my spouse, embarking on the adventure of learning with my 2-year-old bundle of joy. When not on this journey, I enjoy playing football.
